scripts.copy-spec: cp ../rig/spec/rig_spec.json public/rig_spec.json && mkdir -p public/animations && cp ../animations/specs/*.anim.json public/animations/ && cp ../rig/output/rig.glb public/rig.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/output/rig_tpose.glb public/rig_tpose.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/output/animations/*.glb public/animations/ 2>/dev/null || true && mkdir -p public/equipment public/equipment/game && cp ../equipment/output/*.glb public/equipment/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/CharacterMesh/BaseMale.glb public/equipment/base_male.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/CharacterMesh/BaseFemale.glb public/equipment/base_female.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/CharacterMesh/BaseMaleWithSkinTexture.glb public/equipment/base_male_with_skin_texture.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../rig/CharacterMesh/BaseFemaleWithSkinTexture.glb public/equipment/base_female_with_skin_texture.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../equipment/output/base_male.glb public/equipment/base_male.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../equipment/output/base_female.glb public/equipment/base_female.glb 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../equipment/output/game/*.glb public/equipment/game/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp ../equipment/spec/equipment_spec.json public/equipment/equipment_spec.json 2>/dev/null || true
